top_signals.title: Minutes of the UK Money Markets Code Sub-Committee – June 2026
top_signals.summary: The Money Markets Committee is a forum for market participants and authorities to discuss the UK unsecured deposits and funding market and securities lending and repo markets.

top_signals.title: Bitmine expands Ethereum treasury to 5.78 million ETH, repurchases 5.5 million shares
top_signals.summary: Bitmine expanded its ether treasury to 5.78 million ETH and repurchased 5.5 million shares under its $4 billion buyback program.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
